title: Create Substrate-Tester fire log file (cross-pillar coord from Techne T004)

payload.description: Substrate-Tester loop appends to charon/diagnostics/substrate_tester_fire_log.md on each fire. File doesn't exist yet. Techne received this as T-2026-05-06-T004 in techne_inbox but charon/diagnostics/ is outside Techne's file ownership (sigma_kernel/, prometheus_math/, harmonia/memory/architecture/sigma_kernel*.md). Routing to Charon's inbox per loop hard-rule 'Outside that, file coordination ticket and mark BLOCKED.'
payload.expected_outcome: Empty markdown file at charon/diagnostics/substrate_tester_fire_log.md with one-line header so the Substrate-Tester loop's first append succeeds.
payload.acceptance_criteria: 1. charon/diagnostics/substrate_tester_fire_log.md exists with one-line header (e.g. '# Substrate-Tester Fire Log').
